mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_code, filter_name, filter_type, expression, description, is_system, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_filter WHERE entity_code = #{entityCode} AND is_system = true AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, entity_code, filter_name, filter_type, expression, description, is_system, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_filter WHERE entity_code = #{entityCode} AND is_deleted = false
